requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — 220–240 V / 50 Hz, Dual Plug (Type I Australian and Type C French)
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全——220–240V/50Hz，双插头（澳式I型及法式C型）
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全——220–240V/50Hz，雙插頭（澳式I型及法式C型）

summary.en: Vanuatu operates on a 220–240 V / 50 Hz electrical supply. Due to its dual colonial heritage (British-administered and French-administered condominium prior to independence in 1980), both Type I (Australian angled 3-pin) and Type C (French 2-pin Europlug) socket types are in active use, particularly between urban areas and the northern islands. Wireless and IoT devices with mains power supply must be compatible with 220–240 V / 50 Hz. No formal mandatory pre-market electrical safety certification authority equivalent to Australia's EESS or the European CE LVD scheme exists in Vanuatu. Products are nevertheless expected to meet basic safety standards; IEC 62368-1 or AS/NZS 62368-1 test reports are recommended as technical evidence for mains-powered devices. Vanuatu's small market and limited enforcement infrastructure mean formal pre-market certification is not administered at scale.
summary.zh: 瓦努阿图使用220–240V/50Hz电源供电。由于其双重殖民遗产（独立前1980年为英法共管），I型（澳式斜三插）和C型（法式双圆插/欧式插头）插座类型均在使用，尤其在城市地区和北部岛屿之间有所不同。带市电电源的无线和物联网设备须兼容220–240V/50Hz。瓦努阿图没有相当于澳大利亚EESS或欧洲CE低压指令（LVD）的正式强制上市前电气安全认证机构。尽管如此，产品仍应满足基本安全标准；对于市电供电设备，建议使用IEC 62368-1或AS/NZS 62368-1测试报告作为技术证据。瓦努阿图小型市场及有限的执法基础设施意味着正式上市前认证尚未规模化实施。
summary.zht: 萬那杜使用220–240V/50Hz電源供電。由於其雙重殖民遺產（獨立前1980年為英法共管），I型（澳式斜三插）和C型（法式雙圓插/歐式插頭）插座類型均在使用，尤其在城市地區和北部島嶼之間有所不同。帶市電電源的無線和物聯網裝置須相容220–240V/50Hz。萬那杜沒有相當於澳洲EESS或歐洲CE低壓指令（LVD）的正式強制上市前電氣安全認證機構。儘管如此，產品仍應滿足基本安全標準；對於市電供電裝置，建議使用IEC 62368-1或AS/NZS 62368-1測試報告作為技術證據。萬那杜小型市場及有限的執法基礎設施意味著正式上市前認證尚未規模化實施。

standards_or_laws: Plug types in use: Type I (AS/NZS 3112, Australian angled 3-pin) and Type C (Europlug, French colonial legacy northern islands)
IEC 62368-1 — Audio/video, IT and communications technology equipment: Safety requirements (recommended international reference)
AS/NZS 62368-1 — Australian/NZ edition (recommended as technical evidence basis)

summary.en: In China, mains-powered IT and audio/video equipment electrical safety is governed by GB 4943.1 (Information technology equipment — Safety), requiring CCC (China Compulsory Certification) administered by CNCA. China uses 220 V / 50 Hz (compatible with Vanuatu mains voltage) and Type I-equivalent plugs are not standard; China uses Type A and Type I plug sockets under GB/T 1002. GB 4943.1 is technically aligned with IEC 60950-1 and transitioning to GB 4943.1-2022 aligned with IEC 62368-1.
summary.zh: 在中国，市电供电的IT和视听设备电气安全受GB 4943.1（信息技术设备——安全）管辖，须取得CNCA管理的强制性产品认证（CCC）。中国使用220V/50Hz（与瓦努阿图市电电压兼容），标准插头不包含I型，中国依据GB/T 1002使用A型和I型插座。GB 4943.1与IEC 60950-1技术协调，正过渡至与IEC 62368-1协调的GB 4943.1-2022。
summary.zht: 在中國，市電供電的IT和視聽設備電氣安全受GB 4943.1（信息技術設備——安全）管轄，須取得CNCA管理的強制性產品認證（CCC）。中國使用220V/50Hz（與萬那杜市電電壓相容），標準插頭不包含I型，中國依據GB/T 1002使用A型和I型插座。GB 4943.1與IEC 60950-1技術協調，正過渡至與IEC 62368-1協調的GB 4943.1-2022。

standards_or_laws: GB 4943.1 — IT equipment electrical safety (China mandatory for CCC-listed categories)
GB 4943.1-2022 — updated China edition aligned with IEC 62368-1 (transitional)
GB/T 1002 — Plugs and socket-outlets for household and similar purposes (China)

gap.en: Vanuatu mains voltage (220–240 V / 50 Hz) is compatible with Chinese export devices rated for 220 V / 50 Hz. However, plug type is a critical hardware gap: Chinese Type A or Type I plugs are not the standard combination for Vanuatu; exporters must supply devices with Type I (Australian) and/or Type C (French) compatible plugs or include appropriate adaptors. No mandatory pre-market electrical safety certification equivalent to CCC or EESS is administered in Vanuatu, but products should carry IEC 62368-1 or AS/NZS 62368-1 test evidence as best practice and to support any TRR technical file submission.
gap.zh: 瓦努阿图市电电压（220–240V/50Hz）与额定220V/50Hz的中国出口设备兼容。但插头类型是关键硬件差距：中国A型或I型插头并非瓦努阿图的标准组合；出口商须为设备配备I型（澳式）和/或C型（法式）兼容插头，或提供适当转换器。瓦努阿图没有相当于CCC或EESS的强制上市前电气安全认证，但产品应携带IEC 62368-1或AS/NZS 62368-1测试证据作为最佳实践，并支持任何TRR技术文件提交。
gap.zht: 萬那杜市電電壓（220–240V/50Hz）與額定220V/50Hz的中國出口設備相容。但插頭類型是關鍵硬體差距：中國A型或I型插頭並非萬那杜的標準組合；出口商須為裝置配備I型（澳式）和/或C型（法式）相容插頭，或提供適當轉換器。萬那杜沒有相當於CCC或EESS的強制上市前電氣安全認證，但產品應攜帶IEC 62368-1或AS/NZS 62368-1測試證據作為最佳實踐，並支持任何TRR技術文件提交。

source.publisher: TRR — Telecommunications, Radiocommunications and Broadcasting Regulator (Vanuatu)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Vanuatu uses 220–240 V / 50 Hz with both Type I (Australian) and Type C (French) plugs in active use; no mandatory pre-market electrical safety certification equivalent to EESS or CE LVD is administered in Vanuatu; IEC 62368-1 or AS/NZS 62368-1 test evidence is recommended best practice; plug type compatibility must be resolved by the exporter as a hardware matter.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 瓦努阿图使用220–240V/50Hz，I型（澳式）和C型（法式）插头均在使用；瓦努阿图没有相当于EESS或CE低压指令的强制上市前电气安全认证；建议使用IEC 62368-1或AS/NZS 62368-1测试证据作为最佳实践；出口商须从硬件层面解决插头类型兼容性问题。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 萬那杜使用220–240V/50Hz，I型（澳式）和C型（法式）插頭均在使用；萬那杜沒有相當於EESS或CE低壓指令的強制上市前電氣安全認證；建議使用IEC 62368-1或AS/NZS 62368-1測試證據作為最佳實踐；出口商須從硬體層面解決插頭類型相容性問題。
